_comment: Versioned-pin manifest for az-ai-v2 v2.0.1. Install with `scoop install schwartzkamel/az-ai-v2@2.0.1`. Frozen at v2.0.1 — SHA256 below is the digest of the v2.0.1 GitHub Release artifact and never changes once filled at tag time. No checkver/autoupdate on versioned manifests by design. v2.0.1 is the first publicly published v2.x release; v2.0.0 was tagged but never published (see CHANGELOG [2.0.1]).
description: Azure OpenAI CLI v2 — AOT agent with Microsoft Agent Framework, personas/squads, cost estimator (pinned to v2.0.1)
post_install: Write-Host 'az-ai-v2 v2.0.1 (pinned) installed. Third-party notices bundled next to the binary:'
